titleStmt.title: SII 17.543: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 543. (A.R. No. 501 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
This inscription refers to the invation by Siṅgaṇa Daṇḍanā āka of the Chōḷa country in the 25th year (1240-41 A.D.) of Rājarāja's reign.

It records the order (tāṉa-niyōgam) of the trustees (sthānattār) of the temple of Tirukkōḍikkuḻagar in Kuṉṟūr-nāḍu, a division of Umbaḷa-nāḍu conferring certain honours on Śāttaṉ Bhaṭṭanambi alias Uttamaṉ-Nambi of Atulaparākkiramapuram in Kāṉattūr-nāḍu, who besides providing a capital of 50,000 kāśu for repairs, undertook to provide for the re-consecration, daily worship and festivals in the temple, which had been disturbed and neglected due to the invasion of Siṅgaṇa Daṇḍanāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatton patāvatin Etirāmāṇṭu Umpaḷa nāṭṭu kunṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirukkoṭikkuḻakar koyilttāṉattom Innāṭṭuk kāṉattūr nāṭṭu Atulaparākkiramapurattu cāttaṉ
paṭṭaṉ nampiyāṉa Uttamaṉ nampi ti ku tāṉaniyokam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉār tirukkoyilil muṉpu Irupattaiñcāvatu nāḷil ciṅkaṇṇa teṇṭunāyakkaṉ paṭai naṭantu tecaṅkaḷile cilakai taṭṭuṇṭākaiyil piṉpu Āḷuṭaiyaṉāyaṉā
raiyum nācciyāraiyum Eḻuntaruḷuvikkappāṟtta viṭattu śrī paṇṭārattu Uṭa lillātapaṭiyāle Ittanmattai cilavaṟkku kuṭuttākilum nāyaṉārai Eḻuntaruḷu vittup pūcai koṇṭaruḷap paṇṇaveṇumeṉṟu pāṟttu Inta Uttama nampi pakkale tāṉamākac ceytu nī
rum Ummuṭaiya vaṟkattārum Inta taṉmattaik kaiykoṇṭu Eḻuntaruḷappaṇṇaveṇu meṉṟu colla Ivaṉum Ippaṭikku Icaintu Eḻuntaruḷap paṇṇukaikku veṇṭum poruḷukku Ivar pakkal nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa kācu 5 10000 Ikkācu Aimpatiṉāyira mum kaikko
ṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉāraiyum nācciyāraiyum tirunayaṉamokṣa paryyantamākat tiruppaṇik kuṟaivaṟac ceytu kuṭuttamaiyil Ittirukkoyilile Iṉṉāyaṉāraiyum ṉācciyāraiyum Inta Uttama(ma)ṉṉampi tiruppiritaṭṭaiyum paṇṇat tirukkāppu paṇṇi tiruveḻucci Uḷḷiṭṭa tirunāḻkaḷum E
ḻuntaruḷap paṇṇavum pūcaikaḷum tiruvamutuka ḷuḷḷiṭṭaṉavaiyiṟṟukkum tāṉe ceytu koḷkaiyāle tiru Ulāc ceytaruḷumiṭattum pūcaikoṇṭaruḷumiṭattum pulavar talaivar ṉṟum Uttamapi tāṉeṉṟumparicciṉṉam paṇi māṟavum Ippaṭi cantirāti
ttavaṟ Ivaṉukkum Ivaṉuṭaiya vaṟkattāṟkum Ittiruppaṇi kaṭavatāṉapaṭikku Ippaṭikku Icaintu tāṉaṉiyokam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ikkoyil tāṉattom Ippaṭikku vai tevarkaṉmi māteva Eḻuttu
Eṉṟum Uruttirakoṭipaṭṭar Eḻuttu Eṉṟum cimāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi periya tirumaṟaik kāṭan Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku tirukkoṭikkuḻakar Eḻutteṉṟum tirumaṟaikkāṭu ṭaiyār koyil tevarkaṉmi kuṉṟur nāṭṭu paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ikkoyil kaṇakku Ārāṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ E
ḻuttu Eṉṟum Ikkoyil cimāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi periyatirumaṟaikkāṭṭup pirāṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai virikkuḻalaḻakiya mārāyan Eḻuttu Eṉṟum .
Digital edition of SII 17.543 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
